task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)

title.b: Media transport issues in combination with peripherals

abstract.p: In case there are any Media transport issues in combination with peripherals like a Jumbo Roll Unit or post-processing equipment.

li.p: Use MPI2000 or IJM613 from the media drawer to the external output unit of the printer.
Check with the use of the Jumbo roll unit:

Media should be calibrated when printing from the external input device. Tension of the media between the external input device and the printer must be within the limits (tension must not be too tight)
When media transport is good from the drawer and acceptable from the external input device than involvement of an application specialist is needed
Check the media transport using the post-processing device:
When media transport is unacceptable involvement of an application specialist is needed.
